task_completion.description: The Floreant POS application is launched and the login screen is visible.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The main Floreant POS login window with a number pad for PIN entry is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: The Back Office interface is accessed after logging in.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Floreant POS 'Back Office' dashboard or main window is open, indicating successful login (which requires the PIN '1111').

task_completion.description: The Cooking Instructions management window is opened.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A dialog or window specifically titled 'Cooking Instructions' (or similar menu management screen for modifiers/instructions) is open within the Back Office.

task_completion.description: The cooking instruction 'No Onions' is added to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'No Onions' is visible in the list or data grid of saved cooking instructions.

task_completion.description: The cooking instruction 'Extra Crispy' is added to the system.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The text 'Extra Crispy' is visible in the list or data grid of saved cooking instructions.

integrity.description: The agent used the Floreant POS graphical user interface to add the instructions.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Floreant POS application windows, buttons, and text fields rather than command-line interfaces.

integrity.description: The agent did not bypass the application by directly modifying the Derby database via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows are open showing SQL commands, 'ij' tool usage, or direct edits to the /opt/floreantpos/database/derby-server files.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual POS software, not a text editor or mock file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The application being used has the standard Floreant POS Java GUI styling and window titles, not a generic text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The correct PIN to access the Floreant POS Back Office is '1111'. The exact cooking instructions that must be visible in the final list are 'No Onions' and 'Extra Crispy'.
